description: Sector-specific screening controls for Canadian healthcare providers, health facilities, health products, medical devices, health data, and clinical-service documentation.

metadata.scope: Canada sector overlay for Health. Intended to be applied with canada_core_control_library. Provincial/territorial personal-health-information obligations may also apply.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official Canadian federal/provincial/territorial legal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: Food and Drugs Act classification guidance
Medical device compliance and inspection guidance
Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act (PIPEDA)
Baseline Cyber Security Controls for Small and Medium Organizations

rules.title: Patient confidentiality or health-information privacy evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for patient confidentiality, personal health information, privacy notice, consent, access, or safeguards evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Canadian legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, provincial/territorial overlays, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: PIPEDA and provincial/territorial health privacy regimes

rules.title: Food and Drugs Act product classification or authorization evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for classification, drug/device/food/cosmetic authorization, market authorization, or Health Canada review evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Canadian legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, provincial/territorial overlays, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: Food and Drugs Act / Health Canada classification guidance

rules.title: Medical device licence, establishment licence, or inspection evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for MDEL, medical device licence, Medical Devices Regulations, complaint handling, recall, or inspection evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Canadian legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, provincial/territorial overlays, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: Health Canada medical device inspection guidance

rules.title: Canada Health Act insured-service or patient-charge evidence is present where applicable
rules.summary: Checks for insured health services, extra-billing, user charges, reasonable access, or public health insurance criteria evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Canadian legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, provincial/territorial overlays, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Health data cybersecurity and continuity evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for access control, encryption, backup, incident response, breach response, or recovery evidence for health data systems.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Canadian legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, provincial/territorial overlays, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: Canadian Centre for Cyber Security baseline controls
